title: Metals gain amid renewed supply restrictions
section_path: Metals gain amid renewed supply restrictions
section_path_text: Metals gain amid renewed supply restrictions
summary:
Main
Crude oil markets pushed higher amid concerns of renewed restrictions on Russian supply. Constraints on Chinese output also supported base metals. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2025-08-29 132533.png | assets/2025-08-29_metals-gain-amid-renewed-supply-restrictions_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_60f7906f57e1.png

Market Commentary
Crude oil rose as the prospect of a peace deal between Russia and Ukraine diminished.

children.title: Main
children.summary: Crude oil markets pushed higher amid concerns of renewed restrictions on Russian supply. Constraints on Chinese output also supported base metals.

children.title: Market Commentary
children.summary: Crude oil rose as the prospect of a peace deal between Russia and Ukraine diminished. Germany's Chancellor Merz said that a meeting between presidents Zelensky and Putin won't happen.

children.title: Chart of the Day
children.summary: US tariffs on aluminium imports continued to play havoc with trade flows. The US Midwest premium, the additional cost of buying the metal in the US over the global benchmark LME prices, has continued to rise.
